message:
fix: use process substitution instead of pipe for stdin redirect

The previous `</dev/null` on `bash -s` overrode the pipe, causing
the installer script to be silently discarded. Using process
substitution `bash <(verify_checksum ...) "$@" </dev/null` delivers
the script via a separate fd while still blocking interactive stdin.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
